title: Sameera Bowers What Is Going On
description: Sameera’s mum was proud when she graduated with a degree in Economics from Cambridge. Less so when she went to clown school. Now Sameera needs to find a job. On LinkedIn, she is a “changemaker, global innovator and value-driven impact leader.” But in life, she has no idea what she’s doing. In this multimedia comedy hour, Sameera searches for clarity through psychic guidance, grapples with the science of perfectly spherical cows, plots her rise as the leader of an Indian tutoring empire and wants to make her grandma proud. If all else fails, she plans to become the first 22-year-old living in an old-age nursing home. Sameera was a member of The Cambridge Footlights (2025) and this year trained at the École Phillipe Gaulier clown school in France. In 2025 What Is Going On? completed a sellout run at the Camden Fringe and Sameera performed in the 5-star, award-winning comedy play Penelope Quadrangle at the Edinburgh Fringe, in which critics called her performance “genius” (Varsity).

reviews.reviewer: By The Reviews Hub - Brighton May 8, 2026 Updated: May 8, 2026 No Comments 3 Min
reviews.rating_raw: The Reviews Hub Star Rating 90 % 90% Absurdist, no-nonsense comedy
reviews.excerpt: Recent graduate Sameera Bowers has put together a helluva show at the precocious age of 22. Here she presents a multimedia extravaganza buzzing with ideas, one that showcases a refreshingly absurdist and fiercely anti-bullshit take on the overlapping worlds of high-achieving academia, corporate orthodoxy, and parental expectations.She’s marketed as a former Cambridge Footlights member, which is of
